$comment: Feature inventory for the Frappe clone. Agents may ONLY change 'status' fields (failing -> passing). Never add, remove, reword, or reorder entries. Work in priority order (1 first); within a priority, respect 'deps'.

features.title: DocType storage: doctype + docfield tables hold model definitions as rows
features.verify: Insert a DocType definition via SQL/seed; SELECT returns it; server can load it as a Meta object.

features.title: Field type system: Data, Int, Float, Currency, Check, Select, Date, Datetime, Text, Long Text, Link, Table, Attach, JSON
features.verify: Each fieldtype maps to a correct Postgres column type; invalid fieldtype rejected on DocType save.

features.title: DDL generation: saving a new DocType creates its tab<Name> table
features.verify: Create DocType 'Task' via API; table tab_task exists with columns for every field.

features.title: Schema sync: adding/altering fields on an existing DocType alters the table non-destructively
features.verify: Add a field to Task, column appears; existing rows/data untouched; removing a field never drops data without explicit flag.

features.title: Standard columns on every table: name (PK), owner, creation, modified, modified_by, docstatus, idx
features.verify: Any generated table has these columns; they are set automatically on insert/update.

features.title: Naming: autoname by prompt, by field, hash, and series (e.g. INV-.####) with atomic counter
features.verify: Two concurrent inserts to a series-named DocType get distinct sequential names; no gaps or duplicates under 50 parallel inserts.

features.title: Child tables: istable DocTypes with parent, parenttype, parentfield, idx columns
features.verify: A Table field on Task pointing to child DocType creates the child table; rows carry parent linkage and ordering.

features.title: Link field integrity: saving a doc with a Link value verifies the target document exists
features.verify: Save with a bogus link value fails with a field-level error; valid link saves.

features.title: Select fields validate against their options list
features.verify: Saving a value not in options fails; valid option saves.

features.title: Field flags: reqd, unique, default, read_only, hidden enforced by the engine
features.verify: Missing required field errors; duplicate unique value errors; defaults applied on insert; read_only ignored on client-sent changes.

features.title: Metadata cache with invalidation on DocType change
features.verify: Meta served from cache (single doctype query per process per doctype); after altering a DocType the next request sees new meta.

features.title: Bootstrapping: DocType and DocField are themselves described as DocTypes
features.verify: GET /api/resource/DocType returns DocType docs including 'DocType' itself; the Desk form view can open and render the DocType doctype.

features.title: Zod validation schema generated from DocType metadata, shared by server and client
features.verify: Server rejects type-invalid payloads with field-wise messages derived from meta; client uses the same generated schema.

features.title: Core seed fixtures: User, Role, DocType, DocField, DocPerm, File, Comment, Version DocTypes installed on migrate
features.verify: Fresh database + migrate command yields all core DocTypes and an Administrator user.

features.title: save_doc endpoint: transactional insert through the Document class
features.verify: POST a new doc; row exists with standard fields populated; response returns the full saved doc with its name.

features.title: Update with conflict detection via modified timestamp
features.verify: Update with stale 'modified' value returns a 409-style conflict error; fresh value saves.

features.title: Lifecycle hook chain: validate, before_save, after_save (before_insert/after_insert on create)
features.verify: A test controller mutating values in validate is reflected in the saved row; a thrown error in validate aborts the transaction entirely.

features.title: Controller registry: per-DocType TypeScript classes register hooks by DocType name
features.verify: Adding a controller file for 'Task' and restarting makes its hooks fire; DocTypes without controllers still save.

features.title: Child table saves are atomic with parent: rows inserted/updated/deleted to match payload
features.verify: Save parent with 3 child rows, then resave with 2 modified rows; DB matches payload exactly; a child validation error rolls back the parent too.

features.title: Delete with referential integrity: cannot delete a doc that other docs link to
features.verify: Deleting a linked Customer fails with a message naming the linking doc; unlinked doc deletes.

features.title: Submittable documents: docstatus 0/1/2, on_submit/on_cancel hooks, submitted docs immutable
features.verify: Submit sets docstatus=1 and fires on_submit; editing a submitted doc is rejected; cancel sets docstatus=2.

features.title: Amend: create a new draft from a cancelled document (NAME-1 naming, amended_from)
features.verify: Amending a cancelled doc creates a copy with amended_from set and derived name.

features.title: Version history: every save records a field-level diff in a Version doctype
features.verify: Two saves produce a Version row whose diff lists exactly the changed fields with old/new values.

features.title: Server data API: get_doc and get_list with filters, fields, order_by, limit/offset
features.verify: get_list with [['status','=','Open']] style filters returns correct rows; unknown field in filter errors cleanly.

features.title: Field-wise validation errors: engine returns {field: message} maps, not just strings
features.verify: A payload with two invalid fields returns both errors keyed by fieldname in one response.

features.title: Rename document: change primary key and update all Link references
features.verify: Rename a Customer; docs that linked to the old name now point at the new name.

features.title: Generic REST resource: GET/POST /api/resource/:doctype and GET/PUT/DELETE /api/resource/:doctype/:name
features.verify: Full CRUD on any DocType through these routes with no per-DocType code; unknown doctype returns 404.

features.title: List API supports filters, fields projection, order_by, limit_start/limit_page_length as query params
features.verify: Query-param filters produce the same results as server get_list; pagination totals correct.

features.title: RPC endpoint /api/method/:path for whitelisted server methods
features.verify: A method registered as whitelisted is callable with JSON args; non-whitelisted method returns 403.

features.title: Auth: email/password login (Supabase Auth), JWT session accepted by the server, logout
features.verify: Login yields a token; API calls without a token are 401; with token they resolve the correct user.

features.title: API key + secret token auth for integrations (Authorization: token k:s)
features.verify: Generated key/secret pair authenticates API calls as that user; revoked key stops working.

features.title: Consistent error envelope: HTTP status + {error: {type, message, fields?}}
features.verify: Validation, permission, not-found, and conflict errors all follow the envelope with correct status codes.

features.title: Rate limiting per user/key
features.verify: Exceeding the configured request budget returns 429 with Retry-After.

features.title: CORS and security headers configured for the Desk origin
features.verify: Browser app on its dev origin can call the API; disallowed origin is blocked.

features.title: Role model: Role DocType and user-role assignment (Has Role child table on User)
features.verify: Assigning/removing a role on a user via API changes get_roles(user) output.

features.title: DocPerm: per-DocType, per-role grants for read/write/create/delete/submit/cancel/amend
features.verify: Permission rows control each action; a role without create cannot POST but may GET if read is granted.

features.title: Server-side enforcement on every document endpoint and get_list
features.verify: A user lacking read on a DocType gets 403 on list/read; lacking write gets 403 on update, verified through real HTTP calls.

features.title: Generated RLS: SELECT policies per DocType from DocPerm; direct client INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE denied
features.verify: supabase-js as a logged-in user can select permitted tables only; any direct write via supabase-js fails.

features.title: User Permissions: restrict a user to documents linked to allowed values (e.g. only Company A)
features.verify: With a user permission on Company A, list views and reads exclude Company B docs; direct GET of a B doc is 403.

features.title: Field-level permissions via permlevel
features.verify: Fields at permlevel 1 are omitted from reads and ignored on writes for roles without level-1 access.

features.title: if_owner permissions: grant applies only to documents the user owns
features.verify: User with if_owner read sees only their own docs in list and detail.

features.title: DocShare: share a specific document with a user (read/write/submit/share)
features.verify: Sharing grants access to that one doc without role changes; unshare revokes it.

features.title: Administrator/System Manager bypass
features.verify: Administrator passes all checks including on newly created DocTypes with no DocPerm rows.

features.title: API responses filtered to permitted fields and permitted docs everywhere (search, link queries, reports)
features.verify: Link-field search as a restricted user never returns docs the user cannot read.

features.title: Desk shell: login page, authenticated layout, sidebar navigation listing DocTypes, client routing
features.verify: Playwright: log in as Administrator, sidebar lists core DocTypes, navigating updates the URL and view.

features.title: Generic ListView: renders any DocType from metadata with columns, sorting, pagination
features.verify: Playwright: open two different DocTypes' lists with zero DocType-specific frontend code; sort and paginate.

features.title: List filters UI: add/remove field-operator-value filters, reflected in the URL
features.verify: Playwright: apply a filter, results narrow correctly, reload preserves the filter from the URL.

features.title: Generic FormView: renders every field type as the right control from metadata
features.verify: Playwright: open a doc containing all field types; each renders as the correct input (date picker, checkbox, select, link, table).

features.title: Form save through save_doc with dirty-state tracking and field-wise server errors shown inline
features.verify: Playwright: edit and save persists; a server validation error highlights the exact offending field.

features.title: Link field control: debounced autocomplete search against permitted documents
features.verify: Playwright: typing filters suggestions; picking one stores the name; creating from the field offers 'Create new'.

features.title: Child table grid: add/edit/delete/reorder rows inline within the form
features.verify: Playwright: manipulate child rows and save; DB reflects order and content.

features.title: Form layout from metadata: Section Break and Column Break fields produce sections and columns
features.verify: Playwright: a DocType with breaks renders grouped sections matching the metadata order.

features.title: Client-side validation from the shared zod schema before submit
features.verify: Playwright: submitting with a missing required field shows an inline error without a network call.

features.title: Submit/Cancel/Amend actions on submittable DocTypes with status banner
features.verify: Playwright: draft shows Submit; submitted shows Cancel and locks fields; cancelled shows Amend.

features.title: DocType builder: create and edit DocTypes entirely from the Desk UI
features.verify: Playwright: create a new DocType with 5 fields via the UI; its list and form views immediately work.

features.title: List bulk actions: select rows, bulk delete, bulk edit a field
features.verify: Playwright: select 3 rows, bulk-edit one field, all 3 update; bulk delete removes them.

features.title: Saved list settings: persisted per user (columns, filters, sort)
features.verify: Playwright: customize a list, log out/in, settings are restored.

features.title: Global search bar (awesomebar): jump to DocTypes, documents, and 'new X' actions
features.verify: Playwright: typing a doc name surfaces it; Enter navigates to its form.

features.title: Keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl/Cmd+S save, Ctrl/Cmd+B new doc, G+D style navigation
features.verify: Playwright: shortcuts fire the corresponding actions.

features.title: Breadcrumbs and document title bar with status indicator (saved/not saved/submitted)
features.verify: Playwright: editing marks the doc 'Not Saved'; saving updates the indicator.

features.title: Form sidebar: assignments (ToDo), tags, shares, attachments panel
features.verify: Playwright: assign a user, add a tag, attach a file; all persist and display on reload.

features.title: Comments: threaded comment box on every document with @mentions
features.verify: Playwright: post a comment with a mention; it renders in the timeline and creates a notification for the mentioned user.

features.title: Activity timeline: interleaves comments, versions, and workflow actions chronologically
features.verify: Playwright: after an edit and a comment, the timeline shows both in order with the diff summary.

features.title: Kanban view: board grouped by a Select field with drag-and-drop between columns
features.verify: Playwright: drag a card to another column; the underlying field value changes in the DB.

features.title: Calendar view for DocTypes with date fields
features.verify: Playwright: docs appear on their dates; dragging an event updates the date field.

features.title: Gantt view for DocTypes with start/end dates
features.verify: Playwright: bars span correct ranges; resizing a bar updates the dates.

features.title: Attach and Attach Image fields with upload, preview, and clearing
features.verify: Playwright: upload an image; preview renders; value stores the file URL.

features.title: Dark mode with per-user preference
features.verify: Playwright: toggle persists across reload; both themes render legibly.

features.title: Responsive Desk: list and form views usable at mobile widths
features.verify: Playwright at 390px: navigation, list, and form save all work without horizontal scroll.

features.title: Dashboards: number cards and charts driven by saved queries
features.verify: Playwright: a dashboard shows a count card and a bar chart that match the underlying data.

features.title: Workspaces: configurable module home pages with shortcuts and report links
features.verify: Playwright: a workspace lists its shortcuts; clicking navigates correctly.

features.title: Report view: column picker, group-by with totals, on any DocType
features.verify: Playwright: group a list by a Select field; group rows show correct counts/sums.

features.title: Saved reports: persist a report configuration as a Report document
features.verify: Save a configured report; reopening it restores columns, filters, grouping.

features.title: Export report results to CSV and XLSX
features.verify: Downloaded CSV matches the on-screen rows including grouping order.

features.title: Query reports: admin-authored SQL with parameterized filters, permission-gated
features.verify: A SQL report with a date filter runs and renders; non-privileged users cannot create or edit SQL.

features.title: Script reports: server-side TS functions returning columns+rows with a filters UI
features.verify: A registered script report renders its filter controls and data.

features.title: Report charts: render a chart from report data and pin it to a dashboard
features.verify: Chart reflects report data; pinning makes it appear on the dashboard.

features.title: Print view: clean printable rendering of any document from metadata
features.verify: Playwright: print view of a doc shows labels+values and child tables, no app chrome.

features.title: Print formats: per-DocType templates with variable interpolation, selectable at print time
features.verify: Two formats for one DocType produce visibly different output; default format setting respected.

features.title: Server-side PDF generation of any print format
features.verify: GET the PDF endpoint returns a valid PDF whose text content includes the document's field values.

features.title: Letterheads: reusable header/footer applied to print formats
features.verify: Selecting a letterhead adds its content to print and PDF output.

features.title: Workflow definition: states (with doc status) and transitions (with allowed roles) per DocType
features.verify: Define a 3-state workflow on Task via the UI; definition persists and validates (no orphan states).

features.title: Workflow execution: state field on documents, transition buttons in the form for permitted roles
features.verify: Playwright: a user with the right role sees 'Approve' and the state changes; audit trail records who/when.

features.title: Server-side transition enforcement independent of the UI
features.verify: API call attempting a transition the user's role doesn't allow returns 403; state unchanged.

features.title: Workflow action notifications: pending-approval emails with action links
features.verify: Transitioning into a state with approvers queues an email to them referencing the doc.

features.title: Custom Fields: add fields to existing DocTypes via UI, stored separately from the base definition
features.verify: Add a custom field to User; it appears in form/list/API and survives a re-seed of core fixtures.

features.title: Property Setters: override field/DocType properties (label, hidden, reqd) without editing the definition
features.verify: Override a field label via Customize Form; UI shows the new label; base definition unchanged.

features.title: Client Scripts: sandboxed user JS hooked into form events (onload, field change, before save)
features.verify: A client script that auto-fills a field on change runs in the form; script errors surface without crashing the Desk.

features.title: Server Scripts: sandboxed scripts on document events and as API endpoints
features.verify: A server script rejecting saves conditionally works; sandbox blocks filesystem/network/process access.

features.title: Export/import customizations (custom fields, property setters) as JSON fixtures
features.verify: Export from one database, import into a fresh one; customizations reappear.

features.title: Job queue with worker process: enqueue named jobs with payloads, at-least-once execution
features.verify: Enqueue a job that writes a row; worker processes it; queue drains.

features.title: Job retries with backoff and a dead-letter/failed state visible in a Job Log DocType
features.verify: A job that throws twice then succeeds shows 3 attempts; a permanently failing job lands in failed state with the error.

features.title: Scheduler: cron-style scheduled jobs (hourly/daily/custom cron) registered in code
features.verify: A minutely test job fires at least twice in 3 minutes with executions logged.

features.title: Job monitoring UI: list queued/running/failed jobs, retry a failed job from the Desk
features.verify: Playwright: failed job appears; clicking Retry re-runs it.

features.title: Long-job progress reporting to the client via realtime
features.verify: A job publishing progress 0-100 drives a visible progress bar in the Desk.

features.title: List views live-update when documents change (Supabase Realtime)
features.verify: Two browser contexts: creating a doc in one appears in the other's list without reload.

features.title: Concurrent-edit awareness: open form alerts when another user saves the same document
features.verify: Two contexts on one doc: saving in one shows a refresh banner in the other.

features.title: In-app notifications: bell with unread count, fed by assignments, mentions, shares
features.verify: Mentioning a user pops their unread count in their open session without reload.

features.title: Outgoing email account: SMTP/provider config stored as a DocType, test-send button
features.verify: Configured account sends a test mail (captured by a local mail sink in dev).

features.title: Email queue: outbound mail persisted, sent by worker, with retry and status
features.verify: Queued email shows status transitions queued->sent; sink receives exactly one copy.

features.title: Send document by email from the form, with print-format PDF attachment
features.verify: Email received in sink contains the PDF whose content matches the document.

features.title: Notification rules: condition-based triggers (on save/submit/days-after) sending email or system notifications
features.verify: A rule 'on submit of Task where priority=High' fires exactly for matching docs.

features.title: Email templates with variable interpolation from the document
features.verify: Template '{{doc.subject}}' renders the actual field value in the sent mail.

features.title: Assignments: ToDo DocType, assign-to on any document, notification to assignee
features.verify: Assigning creates a ToDo visible in the assignee's list and a notification.

features.title: Auto Email Report: schedule a saved report to be emailed on a cadence
features.verify: A daily schedule (run manually in test) delivers the report as attachment.

features.title: File upload to Supabase Storage with a File DocType row per upload
features.verify: Upload via API creates storage object + File doc with size, type, and URL.

features.title: Attachments: files linked to a document, listed in its sidebar, deleted with cleanup
features.verify: Attach two files to a Task; both listed; deleting one removes the storage object too.

features.title: Private files served via signed URLs after a permission check on the linked document
features.verify: User without read on the doc gets 403 for its private file; permitted user gets a working signed URL.

features.title: Image optimization: thumbnails for image attachments used in list/preview
features.verify: Uploading a large image yields a thumbnail variant used by the UI.

features.title: Web Pages: published Web Page documents render as public server-rendered pages
features.verify: Creating a published Web Page makes its route publicly reachable without login.

features.title: Web Forms: public forms mapped to a DocType that create documents on submit
features.verify: Anonymous submit of a web form creates the doc; server validation still applies.

features.title: Portal: website users log in and see only their own documents in a portal list
features.verify: Portal user sees own submissions only; another user's doc URL returns 403.

features.title: Translation infrastructure: message catalog, t() on server and client, language switcher
features.verify: Switching to a second language translates chrome and field labels that have catalog entries.

features.title: Per-user language preference applied on login; date/number formats from System Settings
features.verify: User with language=X sees X after fresh login; dates render in the configured format.

features.title: Single DocTypes (issingle): settings documents with exactly one instance and no list view
features.verify: System Settings opens straight into its form; saving persists; no table rows beyond the single record model.

features.title: User management: profile, avatar, enable/disable, password reset flow
features.verify: Playwright: admin creates a user, user resets password via emailed link (sink), disabled user cannot log in.

features.title: Role & permission manager UI: edit DocPerm matrix per DocType from the Desk
features.verify: Playwright: revoke write for a role via the UI; that role's user immediately loses save ability.

features.title: System Settings applied globally: date format, currency, precision, session expiry
features.verify: Changing date format changes rendering across list/form; currency fields honor precision.

features.title: App system: installable apps declaring DocTypes and hooks in a manifest
features.verify: A sample app adds a DocType and a doc_event hook on install; uninstalling removes its DocTypes.

features.title: doc_events hooks: apps subscribe to lifecycle events of any DocType without owning its controller
features.verify: An app hook on Task after_save fires alongside the core controller.

features.title: Migration runner: ordered, recorded patches (schema + data) executed once per database
features.verify: Running migrate twice applies each patch exactly once; a failing patch aborts cleanly.

features.title: CLI: create-doctype, migrate, seed, create-user, console (REPL with the document API)
features.verify: Each command works against the dev database from a fresh checkout.

features.title: Webhooks: DocType configuring HTTP callbacks on document events with signing and retry
features.verify: on_update webhook posts the doc JSON to a test receiver with a valid signature; failures retry.

features.title: Social login (Google OAuth) via Supabase Auth mapped to the User DocType
features.verify: OAuth sign-in (mocked provider in dev) creates/links a User and lands in the Desk.

features.title: Audit logs: Activity Log for logins and Access Log for exports/prints
features.verify: Login and CSV export each produce a log row with user and timestamp.

features.title: Multi-tenancy: schema-per-site with a site resolver (host header) and per-site migrate
features.verify: Two sites on one Postgres hold independent DocTypes and users; requests never leak across sites.
